quote: Why did the melons plan a big wedding?
author: Because they cantaloupe!

quote: Why did the octopus beat the shark in a fight?
author: Because it was well armed.

quote: Why did the opera singer go sailing?
author: They wanted to hit the high Cs.

quote: Why did the scarecrow win an award?
author: Because he was outstanding in his field.

quote: Why did the tomato blush?
author: Because it saw the salad dressing.

quote: Why did the tree go to the dentist?
author: It needed a root canal.

quote: Why did the worker get fired from the orange juice factory?
author: Lack of concentration.

quote: Why didn't the number 4 get into the nightclub?
author: Because he is 2 square.

quote: Why didn’t the orange win the race?
author: It ran out of juice.

quote: Why didn’t the skeleton cross the road?
author: Because he had no guts.

quote: Why do bananas have to put on sunscreen before they go to the beach?
author: Because they might peel!

quote: Why do bears have hairy coats?
author: Fur protection.

quote: Why do bees have sticky hair?
author: Because they use honey combs!

quote: Why do bees hum?
author: Because they don't know the words.

quote: Why do birds fly south for the winter?
author: Because it's too far to walk.

quote: Why do choirs keep buckets handy?
author: So they can carry their tune

quote: Why do crabs never give to charity?
author: Because they’re shellfish.

quote: Why do ducks make great detectives?
author: They always quack the case.

quote: Why do mathematicians hate the U.S.?
author: Because it's indivisible.

quote: Why do pirates not know the alphabet?
author: They always get stuck at "C".

quote: Why do pumpkins sit on people’s porches?
author: They have no hands to knock on the door.

quote: Why do scuba divers fall backwards into the water?
author: Because if they fell forwards they’d still be in the boat.

quote: Why do trees seem suspicious on sunny days?
author: Dunno, they're just a bit shady.

quote: Why do valley girls hang out in odd numbered groups?
author: Because they can't even.

quote: Why do wizards clean their teeth three times a day?
author: To prevent bat breath!

quote: Why do you never see elephants hiding in trees?
author: Because they're so good at it.

quote: Why does a chicken coop only have two doors?
author: Because if it had four doors it would be a chicken sedan.

quote: Why does a Moon-rock taste better than an Earth-rock?
author: Because it's a little meteor.

quote: Why does it take longer to get from 1st to 2nd base, than it does to get from 2nd to 3rd base?
author: Because there’s a Shortstop in between!

quote: Why does Norway have barcodes on their battleships?
author: So when they get back to port, they can Scandinavian.

quote: Why does Superman get invited to dinners?
author: Because he is a Supperhero.

quote: Why does Waldo only wear stripes?
author: Because he doesn't want to be spotted.

quote: Knock-knock.
author: A race condition. Who is there?

quote: What's the best part about TCP jokes?
author: I get to keep telling them until you get them.

quote: A programmer puts two glasses on his bedside table before going to sleep.
author: A full one, in case he gets thirsty, and an empty one, in case he doesn’t.

quote: Two guys walk into a bar . . .
author: The first guy says "Ouch!" and the second says "Yeah, I didn't see it either."

quote: What did the router say to the doctor?
author: It hurts when IP.

quote: An IPv6 packet is walking out of the house.
author: He goes nowhere.

quote: A DHCP packet walks into a bar and asks for a beer.
author: Bartender says, "here, but I’ll need that back in an hour!"

quote: 3 SQL statements walk into a NoSQL bar. Soon, they walk out
author: They couldn't find a table.

quote: I saw a nice stereo on Craigslist for $1. Seller says the volume is stuck on ‘high’
author: I couldn’t turn it down.

quote: What’s the object-oriented way to become wealthy?
author: Inheritance.

quote: What do you call a bee that can't make up its mind?
author: A maybe.

quote: Why was Cinderalla thrown out of the football team?
author: Because she ran away from the ball.

quote: What kind of music do welders like?
author: Heavy metal.

quote: Why are “Dad Jokes” so good?
author: Because the author is apparent.

quote: Why dot net developers don't wear glasses?
author: Because they see sharp.

quote: Why is seven bigger than nine?
author: Because seven ate nine.

quote: Why do fathers take an extra pair of socks when they go golfing?
author: In case they get a hole in one!

quote: What do you call a suspicious looking laptop?
author: Asus

quote: What did the Java code say to the C code?
author: You've got no class.

quote: What is the most used language in programming?
author: Profanity.

quote: Why do programmers always get Christmas and Halloween mixed up?
author: Because DEC 25 = OCT 31

quote: What goes after USA?
author: USB.

quote: Why don't eggs tell jokes?
author: Because they would crack each other up.

quote: How do you make the number one disappear?
author: Add the letter G and it’s “gone”!

quote: My older brother always tore the last pages of my comic books, and never told me why.
author: I had to draw my own conclusions.

quote: The Sergeant-Major growled at the young soldier: I didn’t see you at camouflage training this morning.
author: Thank you very much, sir.

quote: Why does Waldo only wear stripes?
author: Because he doesn't want to be spotted.

quote: Why did the kid throw the watch out the window?
author: So time would fly.

quote: Where did the API go to eat?
author: To the RESTaurant.

quote: Why did the rooster cross the road?
author: He heard that the chickens at KFC were pretty hot.

quote: Did you hear about the Viking who was reincarnated?
author: He was Bjorn again

quote: What does the mermaid wear to math class?
author: Algae-bra.

quote: Did you hear about the crime in the parking garage?
author: It was wrong on so many levels.

quote: Hey, wanna hear a joke?
author: Parsing HTML with regex.

quote: Why didn't the skeleton go for prom?
author: Because it had nobody.

quote: A grocery store cashier asked if I would like my milk in a bag.
author: I told her 'No, thanks. The carton works fine.'

quote: 99.9% of the people are dumb!
author: Fortunately I belong to the remaining 1%

quote: I just got fired from my job at the keyboard factory.
author: They told me I wasn't putting in enough shifts.

quote: You see, mountains aren't just funny.
author: They are hill areas.

quote: What do elves post on Social Media?
author: Elf-ies.

quote: While I was sleeping my friends decided to write math equations on me.
author: You should have seen the expression on my face when I woke up.

quote: Due to complaints, Hawaii passed a law where you're not allowed to laugh above a certain decibel.
author: You can only use a low ha.

quote: Why are football stadiums so cool?
author: Because every seat has a fan in it.

quote: How do you generate a random string?
author: Put a Windows user in front of Vim and tell them to exit.

quote: Why did the functions stop calling each other?
author: Because they had constant arguments.

quote: Why did the private classes break up?
author: Because they never saw each other.

quote: Why did the developer quit his job?
author: Because he didn't get arrays.

quote: What's the best thing about a Boolean?
author: Even if you're wrong, you're only off by a bit.

quote: How many React developers does it take to change a lightbulb?
author: None, they prefer dark mode.

quote: Why don't React developers like nature?
author: They prefer the virtual DOM.

quote: What do you get when you cross a React developer with a mathematician?
author: A function component.

quote: Why did the developer go broke buying Bitcoin?
author: He kept calling it bytecoin and didn't get any.

quote: Why did the programmer go to art school?
author: He wanted to learn how to code outside the box.

quote: Why did the programmer's wife leave him?
author: He didn't know how to commit.

quote: Why do programmers prefer dark chocolate?
author: Because it's bitter like their code.

quote: Why did the programmer go broke?
author: He used up all his cache

quote: Why did the programmer always mix up Halloween and Christmas?
author: Because Oct 31 equals Dec 25.

quote: Why don't programmers like nature?
author: There's too many bugs.

quote: Why was the JavaScript developer sad?
author: He didn't know how to null his feelings.

quote: Why couldn't the bicycle stand up by itself?
author: It was two-tired.

quote: Why did the math book look sad?
author: Because it had too many problems.

quote: What's a computer's favorite snack?
author: Microchips.

quote: What did the janitor say when he jumped out of the closet?
author: Supplies!

quote: What did one ocean say to the other ocean?
author: Nothing, they just waved.

quote: What's the best thing about Switzerland?
author: I don't know, but their flag is a big plus.

quote: Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants?
author: In case he got a hole in one.

quote: Why did the chicken cross the playground?
author: To get to the other slide.

quote: Why don't scientists trust atoms?
author: Because they make up everything.

author: Because he was outstanding in his field.

author: Because they're shellfish.

author: In case he got a hole in one.

author: Because it was feeling crumbly.

author: Because it wasn't their type.

author: They didn't get arrays.

quote: Why did the developer go broke?
author: They kept spending all their cache.

quote: How do you comfort a designer?
author: You give them some space... between the elements.

quote: Why don't programmers like nature?
author: Too many bugs.

quote: Why did the programmer bring a ladder to work?
author: They heard the code needed to be debugged from a higher level.

quote: Why was the developer always calm?
author: Because they knew how to handle exceptions.

quote: Why was the font always tired?
author: It was always bold.

quote: Why did the developer go to therapy?
author: They had too many unresolved issues.

quote: Why was the designer always cold?
author: Because they always used too much ice-olation.

quote: Why did the programmer bring a broom to work?
author: To clean up all the bugs.

quote: Why did the developer break up with their keyboard?

quote: Why don't skeletons fight each other?
author: They don't have the guts.

author: An impasta.

quote: What do you call a thieving alligator?
